subcodes.first_line: O esteemed handmaid of God, render thanks unto the Lord that He hath chosen thee from amongst all other maidservants and illumined thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله المحترمه شکر نما خدا را که ترا از مابین ورقات انتخاب نمود و مطلع
subcodes.subjects: @justice and wrath of God, @spiritual transformation, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @martyrs and martyrdom
